utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean , I do not feel like I even have a girlfriend anymore .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I do not feel like I even have a girlfriend anymore .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You want me to just quit my job so that you can feel like you have got a girlfriend ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_You want me to just quit my job so that you can feel like you have got a girlfriend ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , it is not , it is not .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God . I cannot keep having this same fight over and over again , Ross , no , you’re , you’re , you’re making this too hard .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay . Okay . Fine , you are right .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Let ah , let take a break , let cool off , okay ? let get some frozen yoghurt or something .
